# workbench_data_collection_version (Resource)

Workbench provisioned Data Collection Version resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "workbench_data_collection_version" "first_version" {
  workspace_id = workbench_data_collection.example_datacollection.id
  display_name = "version 1"
  description  = "first version"
  published    = false
}

output "first_version" {
  value = workbench_data_collection_version.first_version
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `display_name` (String) Workbench Data Collection Version display name
- `workspace_id` (String) Workspace ID to which the version belongs

### Optional

- `description` (String) Workbench Data Collection Version description
- `properties` (Attributes Set) Workbench Data Collection Version properties in key-value pair (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--properties))
- `published` (Boolean) Indicates whether the version is published, cannot be unset
- `release_notes_url` (String) URL to the release notes for the version

### Read-Only

- `created_by` (String) Workbench Data Collection Version created by
- `created_date` (String) Workbench Data Collection Version created date
- `id` (String) Workbench Data Collection Version unique identifier
- `last_updated_by` (String) Workbench Data Collection Version last updated by
- `last_updated_date` (String) Workbench Data Collection Version last updated date
- `parent_folder_id` (String) Version is toplevel folder, default to empty string
- `published_date` (String) Date when the version was published

<a id="nestedatt--properties"></a>
### Nested Schema for `properties`

Required:

- `key` (String) Key of the property
- `value` (String) Value of the property
